message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontName Courier New
skinparam classFontSize 12
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F0F0F0
skinparam classBorderColor #808080
skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #E0E0E0
skinparam classHeaderFontColor #000000
skinparam classHeaderFontSize 14
skinparam classHeaderFontStyle bold
skinparam classHeaderAlignment center
skinparam classAttributeFontColor #000000
skinparam classAttributeFontSize 12
skinparam classAttributeAlignment left
skinparam classMethodFontColor #000000
skinparam classMethodFontSize 12
skinparam classMethodAlignment left
skinparam classStereotypeFontColor #000000
skinparam classStereotypeFontSize 12
skinparam classStereotypeAlignment center
skinparam classStereotypeFontStyle bold
skinparam classStereotypeBackgroundColor #C0C0C0
skinparam classStereotypeBorderColor #808080
skinparam classStereotypeBorderThickness 1
skinparam classStereotypeBorderRadius 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderPadding 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderMargin 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderSpacing 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderGap 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderOffset 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderShift 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderSkew 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderRotate 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderScale 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTranslate 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransform 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderMatrix 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderPerspective 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderRotate3d 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderScale3d 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTranslate3d 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransform3d 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderMatrix3d 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderPerspective3d 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderRotateX 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderRotateY 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderRotateZ 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderScaleX 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderScaleY 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderScaleZ 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTranslateX 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTranslateY 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTranslateZ 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformOrigin 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformStyle 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBox 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxSize 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxSizing 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxAlign 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxJustify 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxDirection 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxWrap 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxOrder 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxFlex 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxFlexGrow 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxFlexShrink 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxFlexBasis 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxAlignItems 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxAlignContent 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxJustifyContent 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxAlignSelf 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxOrder 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxFlex 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxFlexGrow 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxFlexShrink 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxFlexBasis 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxAlignItems 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxAlignContent 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxJustifyContent 5
skinparam classStereotypeBorderTransformBoxAlignSelf 5

class "onlycomplete" as onlycomplete {
  display only complete button has been clicked
  display only the complete to-do lists
}

class "saveAll" as saveAll {
  save All button has been clicked
  save all the to-do lists
}

class "save" as save {
  save button has been clicked
  save the current to-do lists
}

class "openAll" as openAll {
  open All button has been clicked
  open all the to-do list
}

class "openX" as openX {
  open X button has been clicked
  open the to-do list you pick
}

class "main" as main {
  display only complete button
  save all button
  save button
  open X button
  open All button
}

onlycomplete --|> main
saveAll --|> main
save --|> main
openAll --|> main
openX --|> main

@enduml
